title: dura-view
description: Replaces the durability bar for tools with a percentage or text.
body:
A simple mod that will replace the durability bar with a non-intrusive number percentage, either above or below the item (configurable). 

![Image of durability below the tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1pwgXge/images/371ec75a5be7869937ad154c611aa8789e57f32d.png)

Display the remaining durability of the tool instead of a percentage.

![Image of remaining durability instead of percentage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1pwgXge/images/18a86fc080ddbc4c1edc10bb21b2b0988115c6b0.png)

Durability above the item:

![Image f durability above the tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/v1pwgXge/images/646751b053b3cdc42b1e526156aa830033567cf8.png)
